evals.prompt: The docs/providers/README.md feels like a dry reference list. Can you make it more helpful for someone who doesn't know which LLM provider to pick?
evals.expected_output: An improved providers README that helps readers understand the tradeoffs between providers and make an informed choice, with context on when to use each one.

evals.prompt: Review docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and improve it so someone new to the project actually understands why things are separated the way they are.
evals.expected_output: An improved architecture doc that explains the motivation behind each design decision, not just the structure.

evals.prompt: The Getting Started section in README.md just lists steps. Make it so someone understands what each step does and why, especially the Aspire and credentials parts.
evals.expected_output: An improved Getting Started section where each step includes brief context about what it does and why it matters.
